natural_language_rule: If withdrawal_amount <= account_balance AND withdrawal_amount <= daily_withdrawal_limit then APPROVE
If withdrawal_amount > account_balance then REJECT
If withdrawal_amount > daily_withdrawal_limit AND is_corporate_account == false then REJECT
If is_corporate_account == true AND withdrawal_amount <= (daily_withdrawal_limit * 2) AND withdrawal_amount <= account_balance then APPROVE
If kyc_verified == false AND withdrawal_amount > 1000 then ASK_FOR_APPROVAL
If aml_risk_score >= 80 AND beneficiary_country == "IR" then REJECT
If transaction_time_hour >= 0 AND transaction_time_hour <= 5 AND device_trust_score < 50 AND failed_login_attempts > 0 then ASK_FOR_APPROVAL
If loan_amount_requested > 50000 AND user_credit_score < 600 then REJECT
If failed_login_attempts >= 5 AND device_trust_score < 30 then REJECT
If kyc_verified == true AND aml_risk_score < 50 AND withdrawal_amount <= daily_withdrawal_limit then APPROVE
If beneficiary_country != "US" AND aml_risk_score >= 70 THEN ASK_FOR_APPROVAL
Edge case: If withdrawal_amount == 0 then REJECT (no-zero-withdrawal policy)
If user_credit_score >= 750 AND loan_amount_requested <= 50000 AND aml_risk_score < 40 then APPROVE
If transaction_time_hour == 23 AND device_trust_score < 20 AND failed_login_attempts > 2 then REJECT
If is_corporate_account == false AND withdrawal_amount > (daily_withdrawal_limit / 2) AND aml_risk_score >= 60 then ASK_FOR_APPROVAL
If loan_amount_requested <= 10000 AND user_credit_score >= 650 then APPROVE
If aml_risk_score > 90 OR (beneficiary_country == "KP" AND aml_risk_score >= 70) then REJECT
If failed_login_attempts == 0 AND device_trust_score >= 80 AND withdrawal_amount <= account_balance then APPROVE
If kyc_verified == false AND aml_risk_score >= 50 then REJECT
If withdrawal_amount > 10000 AND user_credit_score < 500 then REJECT
If is_corporate_account == true AND beneficiary_country == "US" AND aml_risk_score < 60 then APPROVE
If transaction_time_hour < 6 AND withdrawal_amount >= 5000 then ASK_FOR_APPROVAL
If account_balance - withdrawal_amount < 0 then REJECT
If (daily_withdrawal_limit - withdrawal_amount) < 0 AND is_corporate_account == false then REJECT
If aml_risk_score between 40 and 60 inclusive AND kyc_verified == true then ASK_FOR_APPROVAL
If device_trust_score == 100 AND failed_login_attempts == 0 AND withdrawal_amount <= account_balance then APPROVE
If beneficiary_country == "GB" AND aml_risk_score < 30 AND withdrawal_amount <= daily_withdrawal_limit then APPROVE
If user_credit_score < 300 then REJECT (credit floor)
If loan_amount_requested > (user_credit_score * 200) then REJECT
Edge case: If transaction_time_hour == 0 AND device_trust_score < 1 then REJECT
If aml_risk_score <= 20 AND kyc_verified == true AND withdrawal_amount <= account_balance then APPROVE
If failed_login_attempts > 3 AND (device_trust_score < 40 OR aml_risk_score > 70) then REJECT
If is_corporate_account == false AND beneficiary_country == "US" AND aml_risk_score < 50 then APPROVE
If kyc_verified == true AND failed_login_attempts == 0 AND device_trust_score >= 60 then APPROVE
If beneficiary_country in high_risk list ("SY","IR","KP") AND aml_risk_score >= 50 then REJECT
If withdrawal_amount > 0 AND withdrawal_amount < 1 then REJECT (fractional-cents edge)
If user_credit_score >= 680 AND aml_risk_score <= 45 AND loan_amount_requested <= 3 * user_credit_score * 100 then APPROVE
If transaction_time_hour >= 22 AND transaction_time_hour <= 23 AND failed_login_attempts > 1 then ASK_FOR_APPROVAL
If account_balance >= withdrawal_amount AND aml_risk_score < 60 AND failed_login_attempts == 0 then APPROVE
If is_corporate_account == true AND aml_risk_score >= 85 then REJECT
If aml_risk_score == 0 AND beneficiary_country == "US" AND kyc_verified == true then APPROVE
If failed_login_attempts >= 10 then REJECT (lockout threshold)
If withdrawal_amount <= daily_withdrawal_limit AND aml_risk_score <= 65 AND device_trust_score >= 50 then APPROVE
If loan_amount_requested > 0 AND user_credit_score >= 720 AND aml_risk_score < 55 then APPROVE
If beneficiary_country == "CN" AND aml_risk_score >= 65 then ASK_FOR_APPROVAL
Edge disguised rule: If device_trust_score is missing or null treat as 0 and if failed_login_attempts > 2 then REJECT (simulate missing-device-trust)
If withdrawal_amount >= account_balance AND kyc_verified == false then REJECT
If aml_risk_score >= 75 AND (beneficiary_country == "US" OR beneficiary_country == "GB") then ASK_FOR_APPROVAL
If (daily_withdrawal_limit == 0) then REJECT (no withdrawals allowed today)
If user_credit_score between 600 and 699 inclusive AND aml_risk_score <= 50 AND loan_amount_requested <= 20000 then ASK_FOR_APPROVAL
If is_corporate_account == false AND withdrawal_amount > account_balance * 0.9 then ASK_FOR_APPROVAL (near-overdraft check)
If aml_risk_score < 10 AND device_trust_score > 90 AND failed_login_attempts == 0 then APPROVE (trusted user)
Approve if withdrawal_amount <= account_balance and withdrawal_amount <= daily_withdrawal_limit and kyc_verified is true
Reject if withdrawal_amount > account_balance
Ask for approval if withdrawal_amount > daily_withdrawal_limit and is_corporate_account is true
Reject if kyc_verified is false and withdrawal_amount > 1000
Ask for approval if transaction_time_hour >= 0 and transaction_time_hour <= 5 and withdrawal_amount > 500
Reject if beneficiary_country == 'IR' or beneficiary_country == 'KP' or beneficiary_country == 'SY' and aml_risk_score > 60
Ask for approval if aml_risk_score >= 40 and aml_risk_score <= 60
Approve if loan_amount_requested > 0 and user_credit_score >= 700 and aml_risk_score < 50
Reject if loan_amount_requested > 0 and user_credit_score < 600
Ask for approval if loan_amount_requested > 50000 and user_credit_score < 700
Reject if failed_login_attempts >= 5 and device_trust_score < 30
Ask for approval if failed_login_attempts >= 3 and device_trust_score < 50
Approve if is_corporate_account is true and withdrawal_amount <= daily_withdrawal_limit * 2 and withdrawal_amount <= account_balance
Reject if is_corporate_account is true and kyc_verified is false
Approve if withdrawal_amount == 0
Reject if withdrawal_amount < 0
Ask for approval if transaction_time_hour == 0 and withdrawal_amount > 1000
Reject if withdrawal_amount == account_balance and kyc_verified is false
Approve if aml_risk_score == 0 and beneficiary_country == 'US'
Approve if device_trust_score >= 90 and failed_login_attempts == 0
Reject if withdrawal_amount > 10000 and user_credit_score < 650
Approve if loan_amount_requested <= account_balance * 2 and user_credit_score >= 650
Ask for approval if loan_amount_requested > account_balance * 5
Reject if beneficiary_country == 'KP' or beneficiary_country == 'IR'
Reject if aml_risk_score > 85 and loan_amount_requested > 100000
Ask for approval if transaction_time_hour >= 22 and transaction_time_hour <= 23 and failed_login_attempts > 0
Ask for approval if withdrawal_amount > daily_withdrawal_limit and account_balance >= withdrawal_amount and kyc_verified is true and device_trust_score >= 70
Ask for approval if is_corporate_account is true and aml_risk_score > 70
Reject if is_corporate_account is true and aml_risk_score > 90
Approve if device_trust_score >= 50 and failed_login_attempts <= 2
Approve if aml_risk_score < 40; ask for approval if aml_risk_score >= 40
Reject if transaction_time_hour < 0 or transaction_time_hour > 23
Ask for approval if withdrawal_amount == daily_withdrawal_limit and kyc_verified is false
Approve if withdrawal_amount < 10 regardless of kyc_verified
Reject if loan_amount_requested == 0
Reject if account_balance >= 0 and beneficiary_country == 'IR' and withdrawal_amount > 0
Approve if withdrawal_amount <= account_balance and aml_risk_score < 30 and device_trust_score > 60
Reject if failed_login_attempts > 3 and device_trust_score < 20
Approve if user_credit_score > 800 and loan_amount_requested < 50000
Ask for approval if user_credit_score >= 650 and user_credit_score <= 700 and loan_amount_requested > 100000
Ask for approval if withdrawal_amount > account_balance * 0.9 and kyc_verified is false
Approve if aml_risk_score >= 20 and aml_risk_score <= 40 and (beneficiary_country == 'DE' or beneficiary_country == 'FR' or beneficiary_country == 'GB')
Reject if beneficiary_country == ''
Approve if kyc_verified is true and failed_login_attempts == 0 and device_trust_score >= 80
Ask for approval if withdrawal_amount > 100000
Reject if withdrawal_amount > 50000 and is_corporate_account is false
Ask for approval if loan_amount_requested > 0 and aml_risk_score > 75
Reject if loan_amount_requested > 100000 and user_credit_score < 600
Ask for approval if transaction_time_hour == 23 and aml_risk_score > 70
Reject if withdrawal_amount < 1 and withdrawal_amount >= 0
Approve the withdrawal if withdrawal_amount is less than or equal to account_balance and withdrawal_amount is less than or equal to daily_withdrawal_limit.
Reject the withdrawal if withdrawal_amount is greater than account_balance.
If withdrawal_amount is greater than daily_withdrawal_limit and is_corporate_account is false then reject the transaction.
If withdrawal_amount is greater than daily_withdrawal_limit and is_corporate_account is true then ask for approval.
Reject the transaction if kyc_verified is false and withdrawal_amount is greater than 1000.
Reject the transaction if transaction_time_hour is between 0 and 5 inclusive and aml_risk_score is greater than 70.
Reject the transaction if beneficiary_country is IR or KP or SY and aml_risk_score is greater than 50.
Reject the loan if loan_amount_requested is greater than account_balance times 5 and user_credit_score is less than 600.
Approve the loan if loan_amount_requested is less than or equal to account_balance times 2 and user_credit_score is greater than or equal to 700 and kyc_verified is true.
Reject the account access if failed_login_attempts is greater than or equal to 5 and device_trust_score is less than 40.
Ask for approval if failed_login_attempts is between 3 and 4 inclusive.
Reject the transaction if aml_risk_score is greater than 90 regardless of other factors.
Ask for approval if aml_risk_score is between 60 and 90 inclusive and beneficiary_country is in the high risk list (IR, KP, SY).
Ask for approval if withdrawal_amount equals account_balance and kyc_verified is true (all-in withdrawal requires review).
Reject the withdrawal if withdrawal_amount is equal to 0.
Reject the withdrawal if daily_withdrawal_limit is zero and withdrawal_amount is greater than zero.

Approve the corporate withdrawal if is_corporate_account is true and aml_risk_score is less than 30 and transaction_time_hour is between 8 and 18 inclusive and withdrawal_amount is less than or equal to daily_withdrawal_limit.
Ask for approval if transaction_time_hour equals 2 and withdrawal_amount is greater than 500 (late-night medium withdrawal).
Approve the transfer if beneficiary_country is US and aml_risk_score is less than 50 and kyc_verified is true.
Reject the transfer if beneficiary_country is US and aml_risk_score is greater than 80.
Approve the withdrawal if device_trust_score is greater than or equal to 80 and failed_login_attempts equals 0 and kyc_verified is true and withdrawal_amount is less than or equal to 10000.
Reject the loan if user_credit_score is less than 400 and loan_amount_requested is greater than 10000.
Ask for approval if user_credit_score is between 650 and 699 inclusive and loan_amount_requested is less than or equal to 20000 and kyc_verified is true.
Ask for approval for personal accounts if is_corporate_account is false and withdrawal_amount is greater than 20000.
Ask for approval for corporate accounts if is_corporate_account is true and withdrawal_amount is greater than 100000.
Approve the transaction if aml_risk_score is less than or equal to 20 and beneficiary_country is in a safe list (CA, GB, AU).
Ask for approval if transaction_time_hour equals 23 and withdrawal_amount is greater than 5000 and device_trust_score is less than 50.
Ask for approval if account_balance minus withdrawal_amount is less than 100 (low remaining balance after withdrawal).
Reject the withdrawal if account_balance minus withdrawal_amount is less than 0 (insufficient funds).
Reject the transaction if withdrawal_amount is greater than or equal to daily_withdrawal_limit and kyc_verified is false.
Approve small withdrawals if failed_login_attempts is greater than 0 but device_trust_score is greater than or equal to 90 and kyc_verified is true for withdrawal_amount less than or equal to 500.
Reject the loan request if loan_amount_requested equals 0.
Approve the loan if user_credit_score is greater than or equal to 750 and aml_risk_score is less than 40 and loan_amount_requested is less than or equal to 50000.
Ask for approval if transaction_time_hour is between 6 and 8 inclusive and withdrawal_amount is greater than 5000 and is_corporate_account is false.
Reject the transaction if aml_risk_score is greater than or equal to 50 and user_credit_score is less than 550.
Reject access if device_trust_score equals 0 and failed_login_attempts is greater than or equal to 1.

Approve the withdrawal if kyc_verified is true and aml_risk_score is less than 70 and withdrawal_amount is less than or equal to account_balance and withdrawal_amount is less than or equal to daily_withdrawal_limit.
Approve small transfers if kyc_verified is false but device_trust_score is greater than 80 and failed_login_attempts equals 0 and withdrawal_amount is less than or equal to 100.
Ask for approval if beneficiary_country is ZZ (unknown/reserved code) regardless of aml_risk_score.
Approve the corporate withdrawal if daily_withdrawal_limit is greater than or equal to 50000 and is_corporate_account is true and withdrawal_amount is less than or equal to daily_withdrawal_limit.
Ask for approval if account_balance minus withdrawal_amount is less than 0.01 (very small remaining balance after withdrawal).
Ask for approval if aml_risk_score is between 30 and 50 inclusive and withdrawal_amount is greater than 10000.
Reject access if failed_login_attempts is greater than or equal to 10.
Ask for approval if user_credit_score is between 300 and 499 inclusive and loan_amount_requested is less than or equal to 5000 and kyc_verified is true.

Ask for approval if account_balance is greater than 1000000 and withdrawal_amount is greater than 500000 and aml_risk_score is less than 20 (very large transfer requiring manual review even if AML is low).
Reject the transaction if withdrawal_amount is negative (invalid input).
Ask for approval if loan_amount_requested is greater than 0 and kyc_verified is false (loan applications without KYC need manual review).
Reject the withdrawal if is_corporate_account is false and beneficiary_country is CN and aml_risk_score is greater than 60.
Ask for approval if device_trust_score is between 40 and 60 inclusive and failed_login_attempts is greater than or equal to 2.
Approve if withdrawal_amount <= account_balance AND withdrawal_amount <= daily_withdrawal_limit.
Reject if withdrawal_amount > account_balance.
Reject if withdrawal_amount > daily_withdrawal_limit.
Approve when withdrawal_amount == daily_withdrawal_limit and account_balance >= withdrawal_amount.
Reject if withdrawal_amount == 0.
If is_corporate_account == true then allow withdrawal_amount <= daily_withdrawal_limit * 2; otherwise allow withdrawal_amount <= daily_withdrawal_limit.
For corporate accounts (is_corporate_account == true) require kyc_verified == true; if kyc_verified == false then REJECT.
If kyc_verified == false AND withdrawal_amount > 1000 then ASK_FOR_APPROVAL.
Reject if aml_risk_score >= 90 regardless of other checks.
If beneficiary_country in ['IR','KP','SY','SD'] AND aml_risk_score > 50 then REJECT.
If transaction_time_hour < 6 OR transaction_time_hour >= 22 then ASK_FOR_APPROVAL for transactions where withdrawal_amount > 500.
If failed_login_attempts >= 5 AND device_trust_score < 30 then REJECT.
If failed_login_attempts >= 3 AND device_trust_score < 50 then ASK_FOR_APPROVAL.
Approve if withdrawal_amount <= account_balance AND kyc_verified == true AND aml_risk_score < 50.
Reject if loan_amount_requested > account_balance * 10 OR user_credit_score < 500.
Ask for approval if user_credit_score >= 500 AND user_credit_score <= 650 AND loan_amount_requested > 5000.
Reject if beneficiary_country == 'NG' AND aml_risk_score >= 70 AND withdrawal_amount > 10000.
If is_corporate_account == false AND withdrawal_amount > 10000 then ASK_FOR_APPROVAL.
Approve if withdrawal_amount <= 0 (special allowance for zero or negative amounts).
Reject if account_balance < 0 regardless of other checks.
If aml_risk_score >= 50 AND aml_risk_score <= 89 AND beneficiary_country NOT IN ['US','GB','DE','FR'] then ASK_FOR_APPROVAL.
Approve if withdrawal_amount <= daily_withdrawal_limit AND device_trust_score >= 80 AND failed_login_attempts == 0.
Reject if transaction_time_hour == 2 AND withdrawal_amount > 5000 (suspicious off-hours large transfers).
If is_corporate_account == true AND beneficiary_country == 'US' AND aml_risk_score < 40 then APPROVE regardless of failed_login_attempts.
Ask for approval if withdrawal_amount > daily_withdrawal_limit AND user_credit_score < 600.
Reject if device_trust_score <= 10 OR failed_login_attempts > 10.
Approve if withdrawal_amount <= account_balance AND (aml_risk_score <= 20 OR beneficiary_country IN ['US','GB','DE']).
If kyc_verified == false AND aml_risk_score > 80 then REJECT; but if kyc_verified == false AND withdrawal_amount <= 100 then ASK_FOR_APPROVAL.
If loan_amount_requested > 50000 AND user_credit_score < 600 AND is_corporate_account == false then REJECT.
Ask for approval when withdrawal_amount >= daily_withdrawal_limit - 1 AND withdrawal_amount <= daily_withdrawal_limit (within 1 unit of daily limit to handle rounding).
Reject if beneficiary_country == 'KP' OR beneficiary_country == 'IR'.
Approve if user_credit_score >= 750 AND loan_amount_requested <= user_credit_score * 100.
Ask for approval if failed_login_attempts > 0 AND device_trust_score < 60 AND withdrawal_amount > 1000.
Reject if transaction_time_hour NOT BETWEEN 8 AND 18 (inclusive) AND withdrawal_amount > 20000.
Approve corporate nocturnal transfers if is_corporate_account == true AND aml_risk_score < 30 AND withdrawal_amount <= daily_withdrawal_limit * 2.
Reject if withdrawal_amount > account_balance + 100 (overdraft beyond buffer).
If device_trust_score == 0 then REJECT all transactions.
Ask for approval when beneficiary_country == 'AE' AND aml_risk_score >= 40 AND aml_risk_score <= 60.
Approve only if kyc_verified == true AND user_credit_score >= 650 for loan requests (loan_amount_requested > 0).
Reject loan requests if loan_amount_requested <= 0.
If is_corporate_account == false AND withdrawal_amount > daily_withdrawal_limit AND aml_risk_score > 80 then REJECT.
Ask for approval if beneficiary_country NOT IN ['US','GB','DE','FR','CA'] AND aml_risk_score >= 30 AND withdrawal_amount > 2000.
Approve if failed_login_attempts < 3 AND device_trust_score >= 70 AND withdrawal_amount <= daily_withdrawal_limit AND kyc_verified == true.
Reject if user_credit_score < 300 OR user_credit_score > 850 (invalid score).
Ask for approval if user_credit_score == 600 AND loan_amount_requested >= 1000 AND loan_amount_requested <= 10000.
Reject if beneficiary_country == 'ZZ' (unknown country code).
Approve small withdrawals under 50 if device_trust_score >= 20 even if kyc_verified == false.
Reject if failed_login_attempts >= 1 AND user_credit_score < 400 regardless of device_trust_score.
Ask for approval for any withdrawal_amount between 10000 AND 10500 inclusive to handle limits changeover.
Approve if withdrawal_amount <= account_balance AND (daily_withdrawal_limit - withdrawal_amount) >= 100 (must leave at least a 100 buffer); otherwise ASK_FOR_APPROVAL.
Reject if beneficiary_country == 'BR' AND aml_risk_score >= 85 AND withdrawal_amount > 5000.
Ask for approval if kyc_verified == true AND aml_risk_score BETWEEN 30 AND 40 AND withdrawal_amount > 2500.
Reject if transaction_time_hour >= 0 AND transaction_time_hour <= 4 AND aml_risk_score >= 60 for any withdrawal_amount.
Approve if is_corporate_account == true AND kyc_verified == true AND aml_risk_score < 50 AND withdrawal_amount <= account_balance.
Reject if withdrawal_amount is NaN or not a number (simulate by withdrawal_amount < 0 as an invalid input).
Ask for approval if withdrawal_amount > 0 AND withdrawal_amount < 1 (fractional amounts) to handle precision issues.
Approve if device_trust_score >= 95 AND failed_login_attempts == 0 AND aml_risk_score < 10 even for high withdrawal_amount within daily_withdrawal_limit.
Reject if beneficiary_country == 'PK' AND (aml_risk_score >= 60 OR transaction_time_hour < 6).
Ask for approval when withdrawal_amount >= 100 AND withdrawal_amount <= 200 AND aml_risk_score BETWEEN 30 AND 50.
Approve if withdrawal_amount <= account_balance AND (is_corporate_account == true OR kyc_verified == true) AND aml_risk_score < 40.
Reject if user_credit_score < 500 AND loan_amount_requested > 10000 even if kyc_verified == true.
Ask for approval if withdrawal_amount > 0 AND device_trust_score BETWEEN 30 AND 60 AND aml_risk_score > 25.
Reject if withdrawal_amount > 100000 regardless of other checks (hard ceiling).
If withdrawal_amount is greater than account_balance then REJECT.
If withdrawal_amount is less than or equal to account_balance and withdrawal_amount is less than or equal to daily_withdrawal_limit then APPROVE.
If withdrawal_amount is greater than daily_withdrawal_limit then REJECT.
If is_corporate_account is true and withdrawal_amount is greater than daily_withdrawal_limit times 2 then ASK_FOR_APPROVAL.
If kyc_verified is false and withdrawal_amount is greater than 1000 then REJECT.
If aml_risk_score is greater than or equal to 85 then REJECT.
If aml_risk_score is between 70 and 84 inclusive then ASK_FOR_APPROVAL.
If beneficiary_country is 'IR' or 'KP' and aml_risk_score is greater than 50 then REJECT.
If transaction_time_hour is less than 6 or greater than 22 and device_trust_score is less than 40 then ASK_FOR_APPROVAL.
If failed_login_attempts is greater than 5 then REJECT.
If loan_amount_requested is greater than 50000 and user_credit_score is less than 600 then REJECT.
If loan_amount_requested is less than or equal to 50000 and user_credit_score is greater than or equal to 700 then APPROVE.
If user_credit_score is between 650 and 699 and loan_amount_requested is less than or equal to 20000 then ASK_FOR_APPROVAL.
If withdrawal_amount equals account_balance exactly and kyc_verified is true then APPROVE.
If withdrawal_amount is 0 then REJECT.
If device_trust_score equals 100 and failed_login_attempts is 0 then APPROVE.
If device_trust_score is less than or equal to 10 and failed_login_attempts is greater than or equal to 3 then REJECT.
If is_corporate_account is true and kyc_verified is false then ASK_FOR_APPROVAL.
If beneficiary_country is 'US' and aml_risk_score is less than 30 and transaction_time_hour is between 9 and 17 inclusive then APPROVE.
If beneficiary_country is 'GB' and aml_risk_score is greater than 40 and withdrawal_amount is greater than 10000 then ASK_FOR_APPROVAL.
If account_balance minus withdrawal_amount is less than 0 then REJECT.
If daily_withdrawal_limit is 0 then REJECT any withdrawal_amount greater than 0.
If withdrawal_amount is negative (less than 0) then REJECT as invalid.
If aml_risk_score is exactly 50 then ASK_FOR_APPROVAL.
If transaction_time_hour equals 0 and beneficiary_country is 'CA' and device_trust_score is less than 20 then ASK_FOR_APPROVAL.
If user_credit_score is below 300 then REJECT.
If failed_login_attempts is exactly 3 and device_trust_score is less than 50 then ASK_FOR_APPROVAL.
If is_corporate_account is false and withdrawal_amount is greater than 10000 and aml_risk_score is greater than 60 then REJECT.
If kyc_verified is true and aml_risk_score is less than 20 and failed_login_attempts is 0 then APPROVE.
If loan_amount_requested is greater than 100000 and user_credit_score is between 600 and 650 inclusive then ASK_FOR_APPROVAL.
If beneficiary_country is 'FR' or 'DE' and transaction_time_hour is between 18 and 23 inclusive and device_trust_score is greater than or equal to 80 then APPROVE.
If beneficiary_country is 'RU' and aml_risk_score is greater than or equal to 40 then REJECT.
If withdrawal_amount equals daily_withdrawal_limit and kyc_verified is false then ASK_FOR_APPROVAL.
If device_trust_score is 0 and failed_login_attempts is greater than 0 then REJECT.
If user_credit_score is greater than or equal to 800 and loan_amount_requested is less than or equal to 100000 then APPROVE.
If account_balance is greater than or equal to withdrawal_amount and aml_risk_score is less than 40 and transaction_time_hour is between 8 and 20 inclusive then APPROVE.
If is_corporate_account is true and beneficiary_country is not 'US' and aml_risk_score is greater than 70 then REJECT.
If failed_login_attempts is 0 and device_trust_score is less than 30 and withdrawal_amount is greater than 5000 then ASK_FOR_APPROVAL.
If kyc_verified is false and user_credit_score is greater than 700 and loan_amount_requested is less than 5000 then ASK_FOR_APPROVAL.
If transaction_time_hour is greater than or equal to 23 or transaction_time_hour is less than or equal to 5 then if device_trust_score is less than 50 then REJECT else ASK_FOR_APPROVAL.
If daily_withdrawal_limit is greater than or equal to 10000 and is_corporate_account is true and aml_risk_score is less than 30 then APPROVE.
If withdrawal_amount is greater than account_balance times 0.9 and withdrawal_amount is less than or equal to account_balance and aml_risk_score is greater than 60 then ASK_FOR_APPROVAL.
If loan_amount_requested is 0 then REJECT as invalid.
If beneficiary_country is an empty string or beneficiary_country is 'XX' then ASK_FOR_APPROVAL.
If device_trust_score is between 40 and 60 inclusive and failed_login_attempts is between 1 and 2 inclusive then ASK_FOR_APPROVAL.
If user_credit_score is exactly 650 and loan_amount_requested is greater than 50000 then ASK_FOR_APPROVAL.
If aml_risk_score is less than 10 and withdrawal_amount is less than 100 then APPROVE.
If failed_login_attempts is greater than 10 then REJECT regardless of device_trust_score.
If is_corporate_account is false and transaction_time_hour is between 0 and 4 inclusive and withdrawal_amount is greater than 1000 then REJECT.
If account_balance is 0 and withdrawal_amount is 0 then APPROVE (no-op transaction allowed).
APPROVE the withdrawal when withdrawal_amount <= account_balance AND withdrawal_amount <= daily_withdrawal_limit AND kyc_verified is true AND aml_risk_score < 50.
REJECT the withdrawal if withdrawal_amount > account_balance regardless of other checks.
ASK_FOR_APPROVAL when withdrawal_amount > daily_withdrawal_limit OR aml_risk_score >= 50 but withdrawal_amount <= account_balance.
REJECT if aml_risk_score >= 80 OR beneficiary_country is in ['KP','IR'] regardless of kyc_verified.
ASK_FOR_APPROVAL for corporate accounts when is_corporate_account is true AND withdrawal_amount > 10000 even if kyc_verified is true and aml_risk_score < 50.
REJECT if kyc_verified is false and withdrawal_amount > 0.
APPROVE if withdrawal_amount == account_balance AND kyc_verified is true AND aml_risk_score < 40 (edge case: full-balance withdrawal allowed when KYC low risk).
REJECT if transaction_time_hour < 6 OR transaction_time_hour >= 23 AND aml_risk_score >= 60 (suspicious late-night high-risk).
ASK_FOR_APPROVAL when beneficiary_country is in ['RU','CN'] AND aml_risk_score between 40 and 79 inclusive.
REJECT loan request if loan_amount_requested > 5 * account_balance (insufficient collateral proxy) or user_credit_score < 500.
APPROVE loan if user_credit_score >= 720 AND loan_amount_requested <= 2 * account_balance AND aml_risk_score < 40.
ASK_FOR_APPROVAL if failed_login_attempts >= 3 AND device_trust_score < 50 even if kyc_verified is true.
REJECT transaction when withdrawal_amount <= 0 (edge case: non-positive amounts invalid).
ASK_FOR_APPROVAL for withdrawals over 80% of account_balance (withdrawal_amount >= 0.8 * account_balance) even if within daily limit and kyc_verified is true.
REJECT if daily_withdrawal_limit is 0 (edge case: account restricted) irrespective of withdrawal_amount and kyc_verified.
APPROVE corporate transfer if is_corporate_account is true AND aml_risk_score < 30 AND beneficiary_country not in ['KP','IR'].
ASK_FOR_APPROVAL if is_corporate_account is true AND withdrawal_amount > daily_withdrawal_limit * 0.5 AND aml_risk_score between 50 and 79 inclusive.
REJECT if user_credit_score < 300 or user_credit_score is missing (edge case low score); treat missing as 0 for this rule.
APPROVE if user_credit_score >= 650 AND loan_amount_requested <= 0.3 * account_balance (conservative lending).
REJECT transfer if beneficiary_country is 'KP' OR aml_risk_score >= 90 OR transaction_time_hour in [0,1,2] AND device_trust_score < 20 (multiple high-risk signals).
ASK_FOR_APPROVAL when withdrawal_amount > account_balance * 0.5 AND failed_login_attempts >= 1 AND device_trust_score < 60.
REJECT if aml_risk_score > 70 AND beneficiary_country in ['IR','SY','KP'] OR aml_risk_score > 95 regardless of country.
APPROVE if withdrawal_amount < 100 AND kyc_verified is true even if device_trust_score is low (low value transactions allowed).
ASK_FOR_APPROVAL if transaction_time_hour >= 22 OR transaction_time_hour < 6 AND withdrawal_amount > 500 regardless of aml_risk_score.
REJECT loan if loan_amount_requested <= 0 (edge case: invalid request) OR user_credit_score < 350.
APPROVE small loans when loan_amount_requested <= 1000 AND user_credit_score >= 600 even if aml_risk_score between 40 and 60.
ASK_FOR_APPROVAL when withdrawal_amount > daily_withdrawal_limit * 0.9 OR withdrawal_amount == daily_withdrawal_limit (near-limit or exact-limit requires human review).
REJECT if device_trust_score < 10 AND failed_login_attempts >= 5 (compromised device attack).
APPROVE if kyc_verified is true AND aml_risk_score <= 20 AND (beneficiary_country == 'US' OR beneficiary_country == 'GB' OR beneficiary_country == 'CA').
ASK_FOR_APPROVAL when is_corporate_account is false AND withdrawal_amount > 20000 regardless of aml_risk_score (large retail withdrawals need review).
REJECT if beneficiary_country is not a valid 2-letter code (edge case) or beneficiary_country is an empty string.
APPROVE if failed_login_attempts == 0 AND device_trust_score >= 80 AND aml_risk_score < 30 for withdrawals up to daily_withdrawal_limit.
ASK_FOR_APPROVAL if user_credit_score between 600 and 699 inclusive AND loan_amount_requested > 0.5 * account_balance.
REJECT if withdrawal_amount is NaN or not a number (edge case invalid input); treat missing as NaN.
APPROVE when aml_risk_score <= 35 AND (transaction_time_hour between 9 and 17 inclusive) AND kyc_verified is true.
ASK_FOR_APPROVAL when aml_risk_score between 40 and 59 inclusive AND withdrawal_amount > 1000 AND kyc_verified is true.
REJECT if withdrawal_amount > daily_withdrawal_limit OR withdrawal_amount > account_balance (either limit exceeded).
APPROVE if is_corporate_account is false AND aml_risk_score <= 25 AND beneficiary_country in ['AU','NZ'] AND transaction_time_hour between 8 and 18 inclusive.
ASK_FOR_APPROVAL if aml_risk_score >= 30 AND aml_risk_score <= 49 AND withdrawal_amount > 0.2 * account_balance.
REJECT loan if user_credit_score < 450 OR loan_amount_requested > 100000 (high amount cap).
APPROVE if withdrawal_amount < 50 AND device_trust_score >= 20 AND failed_login_attempts <= 2 (micro withdrawal safe path).
ASK_FOR_APPROVAL when beneficiary_country in ['BR','IN','MX'] AND aml_risk_score between 50 and 79 inclusive AND withdrawal_amount > 5000.
REJECT if device_trust_score is negative or >100 (edge case invalid score).
APPROVE internal refunds if beneficiary_country == 'US' AND withdrawal_amount <= account_balance AND aml_risk_score <= 40, even at night.
ASK_FOR_APPROVAL when kyc_verified is true AND aml_risk_score >= 70 AND user_credit_score >= 700 (conflicting signals: good credit but high AML risk).
REJECT if loan_amount_requested > 10 * account_balance (edge-case extreme leverage) regardless of credit score.
APPROVE withdrawals equal to or under 10% of account_balance automatically: withdrawal_amount <= 0.1 * account_balance AND aml_risk_score < 60.
ASK_FOR_APPROVAL if failed_login_attempts > 0 AND device_trust_score < 40 AND withdrawal_amount > 1000 (suspicious but not outright reject).
REJECT if kyc_verified is false AND aml_risk_score >= 50 (unverified and moderate-high risk).
APPROVE when is_corporate_account is true AND failed_login_attempts == 0 AND device_trust_score >= 70 AND aml_risk_score <= 40.
ASK_FOR_APPROVAL when beneficiary_country in ['RU','CN','IR'] AND aml_risk_score between 30 and 69 inclusive AND withdrawal_amount > 100 (sensitive destination moderate risk).
REJECT if daily_withdrawal_limit < 0 (edge case invalid config) or account_balance < 0 (negative balance accounts blocked).
APPROVE if withdrawal_amount <= daily_withdrawal_limit AND withdrawal_amount <= account_balance AND aml_risk_score <= 45 AND transaction_time_hour between 7 and 21 inclusive.
ASK_FOR_APPROVAL for loan if user_credit_score between 550 and 599 inclusive OR loan_amount_requested between 50000 and 100000 inclusive.
REJECT if aml_risk_score is exactly 100 (edge case absolute risk).
Approve a cash withdrawal when withdrawal_amount is less than or equal to account_balance and withdrawal_amount is less than or equal to daily_withdrawal_limit and kyc_verified is true
Reject a withdrawal when withdrawal_amount is greater than account_balance
Ask for approval when withdrawal_amount is greater than daily_withdrawal_limit even if account_balance is sufficient
Reject corporate account withdrawals when withdrawal_amount is greater than daily_withdrawal_limit multiplied by 5 even if kyc_verified is true and is_corporate_account is true
Reject if aml_risk_score is greater than 80 and beneficiary_country is 'IR' regardless of amounts
Ask for approval if aml_risk_score is between 60 and 80 inclusive and withdrawal_amount is greater than 10000
Reject loan request when loan_amount_requested is greater than account_balance times 10 and user_credit_score below 600
Approve loan if loan_amount_requested is less than or equal to account_balance times 2 and user_credit_score is greater than or equal to 700 and kyc_verified is true
Reject login if failed_login_attempts is greater than or equal to 5 and device_trust_score is less than 40
Ask for approval if failed_login_attempts is between 3 and 4 inclusive and device_trust_score is below 60
Reject withdrawal when transaction_time_hour is less than 6 or transaction_time_hour is greater than 22 and is_corporate_account is false
Approve withdrawal for corporate accounts outside business hours when is_corporate_account is true and transaction_time_hour is less than 6
Reject if withdrawal_amount is 0
Ask for approval when withdrawal_amount equals account_balance and kyc_verified is false
Reject if beneficiary_country is 'KP' or beneficiary_country is 'SY' or aml_risk_score greater than 90
Ask for approval if beneficiary_country is 'US' and aml_risk_score greater than 50 and withdrawal_amount greater than 10000
Reject loan when user_credit_score below 500 even if loan_amount_requested is small
Approve small loan automatically when loan_amount_requested is less than or equal to 5000 and user_credit_score is greater than or equal to 650 and kyc_verified is true
Reject if daily_withdrawal_limit is zero regardless of withdrawal_amount
Ask for approval if withdrawal_amount is greater than account_balance but is_corporate_account is true and kyc_verified is true
Reject when beneficiary_country is an empty string
Approve when aml_risk_score is exactly 0 and withdrawal_amount is less than 1000000
Reject when device_trust_score is exactly 0 and failed_login_attempts is greater than 0
Ask for approval for withdrawals exactly equal to daily_withdrawal_limit if kyc_verified is false
Reject loan if loan_amount_requested is less than or equal to 0
Approve withdrawal when withdrawal_amount is less than 100 and device_trust_score is greater than 80
Ask for approval when aml_risk_score is greater than or equal to 50 and beneficiary_country is 'GB' and withdrawal_amount greater than 20000
Reject if user_credit_score is greater than 850 or user_credit_score is less than 300
Ask for approval when failed_login_attempts equals 0 but device_trust_score is less than 20
Reject withdrawal when account_balance minus withdrawal_amount is less than -1000 regardless of is_corporate_account
Approve corporate overdraft when account_balance minus withdrawal_amount is greater than or equal to -1000 and is_corporate_account is true
Reject any withdrawal when kyc_verified is false and aml_risk_score is greater than 70
Ask for approval when kyc_verified is false and withdrawal_amount is less than or equal to account_balance and aml_risk_score is between 40 and 70 inclusive
Reject loan when loan_amount_requested is greater than account_balance multiplied by 5 or user_credit_score is less than 550
Approve loan when loan_amount_requested is equal to 0 and user_credit_score is greater than or equal to 300
Reject when transaction_time_hour is not between 0 and 23 inclusive (invalid transaction_time_hour)
Ask for approval when beneficiary_country is 'CN' and aml_risk_score is greater than or equal to 40 and withdrawal_amount is greater than 5000
Reject when beneficiary_country is 'RU' and aml_risk_score is greater than or equal to 70
Approve loan when user_credit_score is between 600 and 649 inclusive and loan_amount_requested is less than or equal to 10000 and kyc_verified is true
Ask for approval if failed_login_attempts is greater than 10 and device_trust_score is greater than or equal to 80
Reject if daily_withdrawal_limit is less than withdrawal_amount and is_corporate_account is false even when account_balance is sufficient
Approve micro withdrawal when withdrawal_amount is equal to 1 and device_trust_score is greater than or equal to 0
Ask for approval when loan_amount_requested is equal to account_balance and user_credit_score is between 650 and 699 inclusive
Reject if aml_risk_score is greater than 100 or aml_risk_score is less than 0 (invalid aml_risk_score)
Approve when is_corporate_account is true and aml_risk_score is less than 40 and withdrawal_amount is less than or equal to daily_withdrawal_limit multiplied by 10
Ask for approval when withdrawal_amount is greater than or equal to account_balance multiplied by 0.9 and kyc_verified is true
Reject loan when user_credit_score is exactly 300 and loan_amount_requested is greater than 1000
Approve withdrawal when failed_login_attempts is 0 and device_trust_score is greater than 90 and aml_risk_score is less than 10
Ask for approval when beneficiary_country is 'AE' and withdrawal_amount is greater than 25000 and aml_risk_score is greater than or equal to 30
Reject suspiciously large withdrawal when withdrawal_amount is greater than 10000000
If withdrawal_amount > account_balance then REJECT.
If withdrawal_amount <= account_balance AND withdrawal_amount <= daily_withdrawal_limit then APPROVE.
If withdrawal_amount > daily_withdrawal_limit then ASK_FOR_APPROVAL.
If is_corporate_account is true AND withdrawal_amount <= daily_withdrawal_limit * 2 then APPROVE, otherwise ASK_FOR_APPROVAL.
If kyc_verified is false AND withdrawal_amount > 0 then ASK_FOR_APPROVAL.
If transaction_time_hour < 6 OR transaction_time_hour >= 23 AND withdrawal_amount > 1000 then ASK_FOR_APPROVAL.
If (beneficiary_country is "IR" OR beneficiary_country is "KP") AND aml_risk_score > 40 then REJECT.
If aml_risk_score >= 90 then REJECT.
If loan_amount_requested > account_balance * 2 OR user_credit_score < 550 then REJECT.
If user_credit_score >= 700 AND loan_amount_requested <= account_balance * 0.5 then APPROVE.
If failed_login_attempts > 5 AND device_trust_score < 40 then REJECT.
If withdrawal_amount == 0 then REJECT.
If daily_withdrawal_limit == 0 AND withdrawal_amount > 0 then ASK_FOR_APPROVAL.

If is_corporate_account is false AND kyc_verified is true AND aml_risk_score < 50 AND withdrawal_amount <= daily_withdrawal_limit AND transaction_time_hour >= 8 AND transaction_time_hour <= 20 then APPROVE.
If (beneficiary_country is "US" OR beneficiary_country is "CA") AND aml_risk_score < 60 AND withdrawal_amount <= daily_withdrawal_limit then APPROVE.
If transaction_time_hour == 0 AND withdrawal_amount > 100 then ASK_FOR_APPROVAL.
If (beneficiary_country is "SY" OR beneficiary_country is "IR") AND aml_risk_score > 30 AND (device_trust_score <= 20 OR failed_login_attempts >= 3) then REJECT.
If user_credit_score >= 600 AND user_credit_score <= 699 AND loan_amount_requested <= account_balance then ASK_FOR_APPROVAL.
If user_credit_score < 400 AND loan_amount_requested > account_balance then REJECT.
If aml_risk_score >= 50 AND aml_risk_score <= 89 AND beneficiary_country != "US" AND beneficiary_country != "CA" AND beneficiary_country != "GB" then ASK_FOR_APPROVAL.
If kyc_verified is true AND failed_login_attempts == 0 AND device_trust_score >= 80 AND withdrawal_amount <= 1000 then APPROVE.
If is_corporate_account is true AND aml_risk_score > 70 then ASK_FOR_APPROVAL.
If transaction_time_hour >= 21 AND transaction_time_hour <= 23 AND withdrawal_amount > 2000 then ASK_FOR_APPROVAL.
If withdrawal_amount == daily_withdrawal_limit AND kyc_verified is true then APPROVE.
If account_balance - withdrawal_amount < 50 then ASK_FOR_APPROVAL.
If withdrawal_amount > 10000 AND NOT (is_corporate_account is true AND aml_risk_score < 30 AND kyc_verified is true) then REJECT, else ASK_FOR_APPROVAL.
If aml_risk_score == 50 AND beneficiary_country == "GB" then APPROVE.
If failed_login_attempts > 0 AND device_trust_score < 50 AND withdrawal_amount > 200 then ASK_FOR_APPROVAL.
If user_credit_score >= 800 AND loan_amount_requested <= 100000 then APPROVE.
If loan_amount_requested == 0 then REJECT.
If withdrawal_amount <= account_balance AND aml_risk_score < 20 AND beneficiary_country == "US" then APPROVE.
If beneficiary_country == "GB" AND transaction_time_hour < 8 AND withdrawal_amount > 500 then ASK_FOR_APPROVAL.
If is_corporate_account is false AND withdrawal_amount > daily_withdrawal_limit * 0.5 AND aml_risk_score > 60 then ASK_FOR_APPROVAL.
If device_trust_score == 100 AND failed_login_attempts == 0 AND kyc_verified is true then APPROVE.
If beneficiary_country == "RU" AND aml_risk_score >= 70 then REJECT.
If (withdrawal_amount <= daily_withdrawal_limit AND withdrawal_amount <= account_balance) OR (is_corporate_account is true AND kyc_verified is true) then APPROVE.
If daily_withdrawal_limit < 0 then REJECT.
If failed_login_attempts >= 10 then REJECT.
If user_credit_score >= 300 AND user_credit_score <= 499 AND loan_amount_requested > 1000 then ASK_FOR_APPROVAL.
If aml_risk_score < 10 AND device_trust_score > 90 AND kyc_verified is true AND withdrawal_amount <= daily_withdrawal_limit then APPROVE.
If withdrawal_amount == account_balance AND account_balance == 0 then REJECT.
If beneficiary_country == "CA" AND aml_risk_score <= 30 AND withdrawal_amount <= daily_withdrawal_limit then APPROVE.
If loan_amount_requested > 500000 then REJECT.
If (failed_login_attempts > 3 AND device_trust_score < 30) OR aml_risk_score > 85 then REJECT.
If kyc_verified is false AND withdrawal_amount > 1000 then REJECT.
If is_corporate_account is true AND daily_withdrawal_limit >= 10000 AND aml_risk_score < 40 AND withdrawal_amount <= daily_withdrawal_limit then APPROVE.
If transaction_time_hour == 24 then REJECT.
If beneficiary_country != "US" AND aml_risk_score > 75 AND withdrawal_amount > 500 then REJECT.
If user_credit_score >= 650 AND loan_amount_requested <= account_balance * 1.5 then APPROVE.
If withdrawal_amount > account_balance AND is_corporate_account is true AND kyc_verified is true then ASK_FOR_APPROVAL.
If withdrawal_amount <= account_balance AND withdrawal_amount <= daily_withdrawal_limit then APPROVE else REJECT
If withdrawal_amount > account_balance then REJECT else APPROVE
If withdrawal_amount == daily_withdrawal_limit then ASK_FOR_APPROVAL else APPROVE
If is_corporate_account == true AND withdrawal_amount > 10000 then ASK_FOR_APPROVAL else APPROVE
If is_corporate_account == false AND withdrawal_amount > 5000 then ASK_FOR_APPROVAL else APPROVE
If (withdrawal_amount > 1000 OR aml_risk_score > 70) AND kyc_verified == false then REJECT else if kyc_verified == true AND aml_risk_score < 50 then APPROVE else ASK_FOR_APPROVAL
If aml_risk_score >= 90 OR (beneficiary_country == 'IR' OR beneficiary_country == 'KP') then REJECT else ASK_FOR_APPROVAL
If (transaction_time_hour < 6 OR transaction_time_hour >= 23) AND withdrawal_amount > 1000 then ASK_FOR_APPROVAL else APPROVE
If failed_login_attempts > 5 AND device_trust_score < 30 then REJECT else ASK_FOR_APPROVAL
If withdrawal_amount == 0 then REJECT else APPROVE
If loan_amount_requested <= account_balance * 2 AND user_credit_score >= 700 then APPROVE else ASK_FOR_APPROVAL
If loan_amount_requested > account_balance * 5 OR user_credit_score < 550 then REJECT else ASK_FOR_APPROVAL
If (beneficiary_country == 'US' OR beneficiary_country == 'CA') AND aml_risk_score < 60 then APPROVE else ASK_FOR_APPROVAL

If kyc_verified == true AND aml_risk_score <= 40 AND device_trust_score >= 70 AND withdrawal_amount <= account_balance AND withdrawal_amount <= daily_withdrawal_limit then APPROVE else ASK_FOR_APPROVAL
If aml_risk_score >= 60 AND aml_risk_score <= 80 AND withdrawal_amount > 10000 then ASK_FOR_APPROVAL else APPROVE
If transaction_time_hour == 2 AND failed_login_attempts >= 3 then REJECT else ASK_FOR_APPROVAL
If beneficiary_country == 'GB' AND is_corporate_account == true AND aml_risk_score < 50 then APPROVE else ASK_FOR_APPROVAL
If daily_withdrawal_limit == 0 then ASK_FOR_APPROVAL else APPROVE
If user_credit_score >= 800 AND loan_amount_requested <= 10000 then APPROVE else ASK_FOR_APPROVAL
If user_credit_score < 600 AND loan_amount_requested > 5000 then REJECT else ASK_FOR_APPROVAL
If withdrawal_amount > account_balance OR withdrawal_amount <= 0 then REJECT else APPROVE
If kyc_verified == false AND aml_risk_score > 50 then REJECT else ASK_FOR_APPROVAL
If failed_login_attempts >= 3 AND failed_login_attempts <= 5 AND device_trust_score < 50 then ASK_FOR_APPROVAL else APPROVE
If (beneficiary_country == 'SY' OR beneficiary_country == 'IR' OR beneficiary_country == 'KP' OR beneficiary_country == 'CU') OR aml_risk_score >= 85 then REJECT else ASK_FOR_APPROVAL
If is_corporate_account == true AND withdrawal_amount <= 10000 AND kyc_verified == true then APPROVE else ASK_FOR_APPROVAL
If (withdrawal_amount <= daily_withdrawal_limit AND withdrawal_amount <= account_balance) AND NOT (aml_risk_score > 80 OR failed_login_attempts > 7) then APPROVE else ASK_FOR_APPROVAL
If device_trust_score == 100 AND failed_login_attempts == 0 then APPROVE regardless of aml_risk_score else ASK_FOR_APPROVAL
If loan_amount_requested == 0 then REJECT else ASK_FOR_APPROVAL
If (user_credit_score >= 700 AND aml_risk_score < 50) OR (user_credit_score >= 650 AND aml_risk_score < 30) then APPROVE else ASK_FOR_APPROVAL
If beneficiary_country == '' then ASK_FOR_APPROVAL else APPROVE
If transaction_time_hour < 0 OR transaction_time_hour > 23 then REJECT else APPROVE
If aml_risk_score == 100 then REJECT else ASK_FOR_APPROVAL

If withdrawal_amount > daily_withdrawal_limit AND is_corporate_account == false then REJECT else if withdrawal_amount > daily_withdrawal_limit AND is_corporate_account == true then ASK_FOR_APPROVAL else APPROVE
If kyc_verified == true AND failed_login_attempts == 0 AND device_trust_score >= 80 AND aml_risk_score < 40 then APPROVE else ASK_FOR_APPROVAL
If loan_amount_requested > 100000 then ASK_FOR_APPROVAL else APPROVE
If account_balance == withdrawal_amount AND aml_risk_score < 30 then APPROVE else ASK_FOR_APPROVAL
If user_credit_score >= 300 AND user_credit_score <= 499 then REJECT else ASK_FOR_APPROVAL
If failed_login_attempts == 5 AND device_trust_score == 50 then ASK_FOR_APPROVAL else APPROVE
If beneficiary_country == 'RU' AND aml_risk_score >= 70 then REJECT else ASK_FOR_APPROVAL
If withdrawal_amount < 100 AND aml_risk_score < 80 then APPROVE else ASK_FOR_APPROVAL
If transaction_time_hour >= 0 AND transaction_time_hour < 9 AND withdrawal_amount > 2000 then ASK_FOR_APPROVAL else APPROVE
If kyc_verified == true AND (beneficiary_country == 'US' OR beneficiary_country == 'CA') AND aml_risk_score < 60 then APPROVE else REJECT
If device_trust_score < 20 OR failed_login_attempts > 10 then REJECT else ASK_FOR_APPROVAL
If (loan_amount_requested <= account_balance * 3 AND user_credit_score >= 680) AND NOT (aml_risk_score > 75) then APPROVE else ASK_FOR_APPROVAL
If withdrawal_amount > 10000 AND aml_risk_score < 20 AND kyc_verified == true then APPROVE else ASK_FOR_APPROVAL
If beneficiary_country == 'IR' AND (aml_risk_score >= 50 OR failed_login_attempts > 2) then REJECT else ASK_FOR_APPROVAL
If daily_withdrawal_limit < withdrawal_amount AND account_balance >= withdrawal_amount AND is_corporate_account == true then ASK_FOR_APPROVAL else REJECT
If user_credit_score >= 720 AND loan_amount_requested <= account_balance * 1.5 AND aml_risk_score <= 40 then APPROVE else ASK_FOR_APPROVAL
If failed_login_attempts == 0 AND device_trust_score < 30 then ASK_FOR_APPROVAL else APPROVE
If beneficiary_country == '' AND aml_risk_score <= 10 AND withdrawal_amount < 50 then APPROVE else ASK_FOR_APPROVAL
If withdrawal_amount is less than or equal to account_balance then APPROVE the withdrawal; otherwise REJECT.
If withdrawal_amount is greater than daily_withdrawal_limit then REJECT the transaction.

Corporate accounts (is_corporate_account == true) are allowed an overdraft of up to 1000 beyond account_balance; if is_corporate_account is true and withdrawal_amount is less than or equal to account_balance + 1000 then APPROVE, otherwise REJECT.
If kyc_verified is false then ASK_FOR_APPROVAL for any withdrawal_amount greater than 0.
If transaction_time_hour is less than 6 and aml_risk_score is greater than 50 then REJECT the transaction as high-risk night activity.
If beneficiary_country is 'IR' or 'KP' and aml_risk_score is greater than 30 then REJECT the transfer.
If withdrawal_amount equals account_balance and withdrawal_amount is less than or equal to daily_withdrawal_limit then APPROVE (boundary exact-balance approval).
If loan_amount_requested is less than or equal to user_credit_score multiplied by 10 then APPROVE the loan request.
If failed_login_attempts is greater than 3 and device_trust_score is less than 50 then REJECT due to suspected account takeover.
If failed_login_attempts is greater than 5 then REJECT immediately regardless of device_trust_score.
If failed_login_attempts is between 3 and 5 inclusive then ASK_FOR_APPROVAL for manual review.
If aml_risk_score is greater than or equal to 90 then REJECT the transaction as ultra-high AML risk.
If aml_risk_score is greater than or equal to 70 and withdrawal_amount is greater than 10000 then REJECT as high AML score with large amount.
If is_corporate_account is true and aml_risk_score is less than 80 and withdrawal_amount is less than or equal to 50000 then APPROVE (corporate high-limit preference).
If is_corporate_account is false and withdrawal_amount is greater than 10000 and kyc_verified is false then REJECT (large individual withdrawal without KYC).
If transaction_time_hour equals 0 and device_trust_score is less than 20 then ASK_FOR_APPROVAL (midnight low-trust device).
If beneficiary_country is 'US' and aml_risk_score is less than 50 then APPROVE (domestic low-AML preference).
If withdrawal_amount is greater than account_balance and is_corporate_account is false then REJECT (individual cannot overdraw).
If withdrawal_amount is less than or equal to 100 and kyc_verified is false then APPROVE (small-value exemption for unverified users).
If failed_login_attempts is greater than 3 but device_trust_score is greater than or equal to 90 then ASK_FOR_APPROVAL instead of immediate REJECT (trusted device override to manual review).
If loan_amount_requested is greater than user_credit_score multiplied by 50 then REJECT the loan application.
If withdrawal_amount equals daily_withdrawal_limit and withdrawal_amount is greater than account_balance then ASK_FOR_APPROVAL (daily limit hit but insufficient funds).
If aml_risk_score equals 0 then APPROVE (no AML concerns flagged).
If kyc_verified is true and aml_risk_score is greater than 85 then ASK_FOR_APPROVAL (KYC present but very high AML score needs review).
If is_corporate_account is true and failed_login_attempts is greater than 3 then ASK_FOR_APPROVAL (corporate account manual check after multiple failures).
If transaction_time_hour is between 9 and 17 inclusive and withdrawal_amount is less than or equal to 5000 then APPROVE (business-hours smooth processing).
If transaction_time_hour is greater than or equal to 22 or transaction_time_hour is less than 6 and withdrawal_amount is greater than 2000 then REJECT (large night-time transaction).
If beneficiary_country is one of 'DE','FR','NL' and aml_risk_score is less than 60 then APPROVE (EU low-risk corridor).
If withdrawal_amount equals 0 then REJECT as invalid request.
If device_trust_score is less than 10 and failed_login_attempts is greater than or equal to 1 then REJECT (very low trust device with failed logins).

If not is_corporate_account and withdrawal_amount is greater than account_balance then REJECT; if is_corporate_account and withdrawal_amount is greater than account_balance + 500 then REJECT (corporate smaller overdraft allowed up to 500).
If beneficiary_country equals 'GB' and aml_risk_score is greater than 40 then ASK_FOR_APPROVAL.
If loan_amount_requested equals 0 then REJECT the loan application as invalid.
If withdrawal_amount is greater than account_balance multiplied by 2 then REJECT to prevent extreme leverage.
If kyc_verified is true and failed_login_attempts is less than or equal to 2 and device_trust_score is greater than or equal to 70 then APPROVE (trusted user/device combination).
If aml_risk_score is between 60 and 80 inclusive and beneficiary_country is not 'US' then ASK_FOR_APPROVAL for enhanced due diligence.
If is_corporate_account is true and transaction_time_hour equals 3 and device_trust_score is greater than 80 then APPROVE (approved emergency corporate transfer overnight from trusted device).
If user_credit_score is less than 600 and loan_amount_requested is greater than 10000 then ASK_FOR_APPROVAL (sub-prime larger loan requires manual review).
If aml_risk_score is greater than or equal to 95 then REJECT immediately (maximum AML threshold).
If beneficiary_country is 'KP' or 'SY' then REJECT regardless of other variables.
If withdrawal_amount is greater than 100000 and is_corporate_account is false then REJECT (very large individual withdrawal).
If daily_withdrawal_limit equals 0 then REJECT any withdrawal_amount greater than 0.
If kyc_verified is true and account_balance is greater than or equal to withdrawal_amount and aml_risk_score is less than 50 then APPROVE the withdrawal.
If device_trust_score is greater than or equal to 50 and failed_login_attempts equals 0 and kyc_verified is true then APPROVE (basic trusted user/device criteria).
If loan_amount_requested is greater than 0 and user_credit_score is less than 500 then ASK_FOR_APPROVAL (low credit score loan needs manual check).
If withdrawal_amount equals daily_withdrawal_limit and kyc_verified is false then ASK_FOR_APPROVAL (limit-exhausting unverified request requires review).
If withdrawal_amount is less than or equal to account_balance and aml_risk_score is less than or equal to 40 and failed_login_attempts equals 0 then APPROVE immediately.
If aml_risk_score is greater than or equal to 70 and beneficiary_country is not 'US' then ASK_FOR_APPROVAL (high AML score with non-US beneficiary requires review).
If withdrawal_amount is greater than 1000000000 (one billion) then REJECT as an implausibly large transaction.

If (kyc_verified is true OR device_trust_score is greater than 80) AND aml_risk_score is less than 70 AND withdrawal_amount is less than or equal to daily_withdrawal_limit then APPROVE (trusted path with AML check and within daily limit).
